title: Availability
description: Availability of an item: whether it can be obtained, a qualifying status, and optional inventory signals.

available.description: Whether this can be obtained. See status for fulfillment details.

status.description: Qualifies available with fulfillment state. Well-known values: `in_stock`, `low_stock`, `backorder`, `preorder`, `out_of_stock`, `discontinued`.

quantity.description: Available stock quantity. Business MAY omit if it does not expose exact counts.

restock_at.description: RFC 3339 estimated restock timestamp. Business MAY include when status is `out_of_stock` or `backorder`.
